data.title: RPM International Analysts Slash Their Forecasts After Downbeat Earnings
Delta Air Lines Wants To Protect Margins And Cash Flow Citing Economic Uncertainty, Does Not Reaffirm FY25 Outlook
data.description: DAL shares up premarket after better-than-expected Q1 results. Operating revenue up 2%, adjusted EPS up 2%, passenger revenue up 3%, operating income down. Delta reduces capacity growth and manages costs to protect margins and cash flow.

data.title: Trump's Tariff Turmoil Topples Ultra-Rich's Wealth — $174B Wiped Out From Fortunes Of World's Top 10 Billionaires, Including Elon Musk, Warren Buffett And Mark Zuckerberg
data.description: The 10 wealthiest individuals in the world, including Elon Musk, CEO of Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA), have lost $174 billion following President Donald Trump's tariff announcement on April 2. On a year-to-date basis, they lost nearly a staggering $350 billion.

data.title: Trump Threatened TSMC He'd Impose Up To 100% Tariffs If It Didn't Manufacture Chips In US: 'These Chip Companies Are Loaded'
data.description: TSMC shares fell 3.37% to close at $141.37 on Tuesday, extending losses in after-hours trading by another 1.89% to $138.70, as investors continued to react to President Donald Trump's threat of imposing tariffs as high as 100% if the chipmaker doesn't build plants in the United States.

data.title: Steve Eisman Of 'Big Short' Fame Says No Amount Of Fundamental Research Can Help Navigate Trump's Tariff War, 'Throw It Out Of The Window'
data.description: Legendary investor Steve Eisman cautions investors that traditional investment analysis is now worthless due to trade tensions and policy-heavy fluctuations.
